title: orthochilus walleri
intro: Orthochilus walleri, also known as the Waller's Orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Orthochilus walleri include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and improve digestion. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
